ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "class_1" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the ticket is for first class */,
  "class_2" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the ticket is for second class */,
  "class_3" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the ticket is for third class */,
  "embarkation_point" TEXT /* Embarkation point (e.g., Cherbourg, Queenstown, Southampton) */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Specific cabin class (e.g., A, B, C) within the class (1, 2, 3) */,
  "ticket_issuance_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was issued */,
  "ticket_issuer" TEXT /* Name or code of the entity that issued the ticket */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Unique booking reference number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_embarkation_point FOREIGN KEY ("embarkation_point") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("embarkation_point")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_points" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation point */,
  "embarkation_point" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation point (e.g., Cherbourg, Queenstown, Southampton) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the embarkation point */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the embarkation point */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the embarkation point at the time */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Brief description of the historical significance of the embarkation point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* User's access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
